RULE: student_id research_student_id age grade support_level must not be null
age must be within approved school-age range
assessment_id student_id instrument_version created_at must not be null
Kolb answers must be ipsative groups without repeated rankings
scoreCE scoreRO scoreAC scoreAE must match raw answers
Felder assessment scores must be present
Kuder dominant vocational area must be present
feature snapshot must have version and timestamp
recommendation must link to student feature snapshot
governance metric must link to audit event or evidence source
multimodal data cannot exist without explicit consent
